case_title: JONATHAN LEIGHTON HOWELL VS. THANE PLAMBECK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$110.00) SERVED DEC-28-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PLAMBECK, THOMAS
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOWELL, JONATHAN LEIGHTON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN LEIGHTON HOWELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THOMAS PLAMBECK IS PRESENT. GLORIA GATLIN, SPOUSE TESTIFIES ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF FILED ON 1-4-22. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT EXHIBIT RETAINED (9-14 EMAIL) JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JANUARY 19, 2022)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWELL, JONATHAN LEIGHTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PLAMBECK, THOMAS $2,170.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,330.00, (SEE ATTACHED) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (GLORIA GATLIN APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THANE PLABECK)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,595.00 FILED BY HOWELL, JONATHAN LEIGHTON AS TO DEFENDANT PLAMBECK, THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOWELL, JONATHAN LEIGHTON
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PLAMBECK, THOMAS
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **DENIED** UNTIMELY
